creator: ecrist@secure-computing.net
text:
OpenVPN development has moved to a more community-driven model; as part of this change, we're making the development version more readily available to end users for testing in hopes of bringing releases in a more timely manner.  This is the first of many-to-come weekly/biweekly updates to the -devel port.

Fix: Apply the patch below.  This is pretty close to what Matthias already had in place, with the exception of removal of the patches (now in the source) and changes to distribution sources.
